reasoning: The TOTCI series underwent a major downward structural break around Jan 1, 2025, dropping from ~2791 to 2655. Since this break, however, the series has demonstrated a steady positive drift, rising from 2655 on Jan 1 to 2677 by mid-March (roughly +1.7 billion per week). Assuming this short-term positive drift continues in a random walk with noise (weekly standard deviation ~7 billion), the near-term probability of an increase relative to the baseline is moderately positive (roughly 62%). However, following the explicit instruction that uncertainty must INCREASE with forecast horizon (making probabilities for distant dates closer to 0.5), I have smoothly decayed the estimates towards 50% for each subsequent, longer-term resolution date.
